name: llm-compliance-comparison
description: LLM Provider Compliance Comparison server. Compare Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, Llama, and Mistral against governance standards (EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, GDPR, SOC 2). Recommend providers for use cases and jurisdictions. Generate risk profiles and compliance matrices. Crosswalk provider safety policies to CSOAI articles. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: compare_providers
tools.description: Compare LLM providers (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, Llama, Mistral) against

tools.name: recommend_for_use_case
tools.description: Given a use case and jurisdiction, recommend the most compliant LLM provider.

tools.name: provider_risk_profile
tools.description: Generate a detailed risk profile for a specific LLM provider.

tools.name: compliance_matrix
tools.description: Generate a compliance matrix showing all providers against all frameworks.

tools.name: crosswalk_providers
tools.description: Map LLM provider safety policies to CSOAI Partnership Charter articles.
